title: Revert e6fbc15f26b2a609936dfc11732037c70ee14cba and reenable tests
body: The issue requiring these tests be disabled should be resolved. Reenable the tests as such.

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

/lgtm
/hold
If the tests pass then cancel the hold.
